products.name: AlarisPro Platform
products.descriptor: Cloud-based SaaS UAS fleet management and compliance platform

evidence.snippet: AlarisPro is the industry’s only aviation-minded, cloud-based UAS fleet management platform that replaces spreadsheets and disconnected tools by unifying safety, compliance, and operational intelligence through centralized tracking of flights, maintenance, parts, and aircraft configuration in one powerful system.

products.name: AlarisPro Essentials
products.descriptor: Entry-level UAS fleet management tier for flight logging and maintenance tracking

evidence.snippet:
AlarisPro
**Start Operating with Aviation-Grade Fleet Intelligence in Minutes**
=====================================================================
AlarisPro Essentials gives UAS operators a fast path to structured flight logging, maintenance tracking, and compliance-ready operational data.

products.name: AlarisPro Field Ops
products.descriptor: Mobile app for offline field flight logging and real-time fleet monitoring

evidence.snippet:
AlarisPro Field Ops
-------------------
Your Fleet At Your Fingertips
-----------------------------
*   Offline logging capability for remote operations
*   Receive real-time alerts
*   Log flights and access data in the field
*   View current pilot UAS status
*   Automatically sync with your AlarisPro account

products.name: BVLOS Compliance Hub
products.descriptor: Interactive FAA Part 108 and BVLOS compliance readiness resource and tool hub

evidence.snippet:
Our BVLOS Compliance Hub is your centralized resource for readiness and rule alignment. Be prepared for the FAA's Part 108 launch - explore interactive tools including our Compliance Checklist, BVLOS Readiness Score, ROI Calculator, and Part 108 White Paper, plus live updates, and resources.
[View the BVLOS Compliance Hub](/bvlos-compliance-hub-wireframe)

products.name: Safety Ecosystem™
products.descriptor: Collaborative safety alert and maintenance analytics ecosystem for operators and OEMs

evidence.snippet: Through our Safety Ecosystem™, we help operators, manufacturers, and regulators anticipate risks, streamline operations, and maintain airworthiness. By unifying data, alerts, and maintenance analytics in one hub, AlarisPro removes the guesswork and documentation burden to empower teams to focus on safe, efficient, and mission-ready operations.

### AlarisPro Safety Ecosystem (ASE)
Collaborative alerts and shared insights across the operator community
